topic: My phone call log shows a three minute call every Tuesday at three fourteen AM to a number I do not recognize
title: My Phone Call Log Shows a Three Minute Call Every Tuesday at Three Fourteen AM to a Number I Do Not Recognize | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My phone shows a three minute outgoing call every Tuesday at three fourteen in the morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen on a dark bedside table showing the call log app, a row highlighted with the time three fourteen AM and a three minute duration, dim ambient bedroom light at the edges, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Boring office job. Live alone. Heavy sleeper.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small studio apartment bedroom in dim evening light, an unmade bed against the wall, a charging cable trailing to the nightstand, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not sleepwalk. I have never sleepwalked.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bedside table at night, a smartphone face down beside a half empty water glass and a paperback book, dim moonlight from a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The number is six oh two area code. Arizona. I have never been to Arizona.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a phone number with a six oh two area code in the recent calls list, the number highlighted in blue, the rest of the call log faded behind it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the number back. It rang once. Then nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a smartphone with the call screen active, calling state shown, the room dimly lit by a single lamp behind the phone, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my carrier. They said the calls connected. Three minutes each time.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a phone carrier billing portal with a table of outgoing calls, multiple Tuesday three fourteen AM entries highlighted with three minute durations, the desk dim around the laptop, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set my phone to record audio overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone on a wooden nightstand at night with a voice recorder app open on screen, the recording timer visible, dim ambient bedroom lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three fourteen Tuesday. My own voice in the recording.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing an audio waveform on a recording playback, a clear spike of voice activity visible at the three fourteen timestamp, the screen casting blue light on a dark bedside table, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I was saying an address. Calmly. Repeatedly.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen with audio waveform playback paused, headphones plugged into the jack, the cord trailing toward a darkened bedroom, dim ambient lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was the address of the house I grew up in. Torn down twelve years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty residential lot at twilight, a cracked concrete foundation outline visible where a house once stood, weeds growing through the slab, neighboring houses on either side, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove there last Wednesday. New construction on the lot.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a new two story house under construction at dusk, plywood sheathing on the exterior, framing studs visible through unfinished window openings, a contractor's pickup truck parked in the dirt driveway, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Someone has been picking up on Tuesdays. I can hear them breathing when I listen back.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone face up on a wooden nightstand at night, the recording app active and waveform showing low audio activity, the screen casting a dim glow on the surrounding bedroom darkness, vertical 9:16 framing
